ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bug */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the bug is associated with */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module within the project where the bug occurred */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the bug (1 to 4) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "resolution_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of resolution */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the bug is assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was assigned */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the bug */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* Reproducibility of the bug (e.g., Always, Sometimes, Never) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the bug was found (e.g., Development, Testing, Production) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the bug record was updated */,
  "reporter_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or details provided by the reporter */,
  "resolution_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence or proof of the resolution (e.g., screenshots, log files) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_resolution_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_type_id") REFERENCES resolution_types ("resolution_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_severity_level FOREIGN KEY ("severity_level") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, On Hold, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the module belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the module (e.g., In Development, Testing, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the module */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_types" (
  "resolution_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution type */,
  "resolution_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resolution type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the severity level is active or deprecated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the severity level was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or deactivated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence or proof related to the comment (e.g., screenshots, log files) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the history entry is related to */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the bug */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the bug */,
  "old_resolution_type_id" INTEGER /* Previous resolution type ID */,
  "new_resolution_type_id" INTEGER /* New resolution type ID */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change was made by an automated process or manually */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_old_resolution_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_resolution_type_id") REFERENCES resolution_types ("resolution_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_new_resolution_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_resolution_type_id") REFERENCES resolution_types ("resolution_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_severity_counts" (
  "resolution_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution type */,
  "severity_1_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs with severity level 1 */,
  "severity_2_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs with severity level 2 */,
  "severity_3_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs with severity level 3 */,
  "severity_4_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs with severity level 4 */,
  "subtotal" INTEGER /* Total number of bugs for the resolution type */,
  "total_time_to_resolution" INTEGER /* Total time taken to resolve bugs of each severity level */,
  "average_time_to_resolution" TEXT /* Average time taken to resolve bugs of each severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_type_id")
)
